name: Forsaken Gang Sandbox
description:
This is kind of just a 'create your own scenario', open ended thing, mostly because I have so many things I end up wanting to do with these guys but I'm too lazy to make so many bots to fit the scenarios.

Probably going to be a lot of changes with this one, and I might use it to test out new descriptions and layouts within the bot, or testing new characters before I add them to my other bots. So use this at your own risk, because this one is bound to be very finicky and change a lot as I test and tweak things within the bot.

I want to reiterate: Use at your own risk. This thing has been tweaked at least 5 times since I made it.

The purpose of this bot is mostly to form a vanilla "base" for other bots that I create, so rather than re-typing everything over again in each bot I make, I can just grab descriptions from this one and adjust based on scenarios.

Characters:

Noob, Elliot, Chance, Guest 1337, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Slasher (Jason), John Doe, Gasharpoon, Mafioso (the whole gang, Don Sonnelinos plus Consigliere, Contractee, Caporegime, Soldier), 1x1x1x1, Noli.

The Cat.

Gubby!

Added a CYOS starter message! Also split the messages into Survivor Cabin and Killer Lodge!
creator: Subconscious
